# ITA - Fattura elettronica - Integrazione vendite

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

**Italiano**

Questo modulo permette di impostare i documenti correlati e il riferimento amministrazione nell'ordine di vendita (o le sue righe) e propagarli alla fattura (o le sue righe) durante la creazione della fattura.

**English**

This module allows to set related documents and Admin. Ref. in the sale order (or its lines) and propagate them to the invoice (or its lines) during invoice creation.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_fatturapa_sale.models.related_document.FatturapaRelatedDocumentType.check_unlink
documentation:
Related documents only make sense if they are related (linked)
to some other record.
When this condition is no more satisfied,
the document can be deleted.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_fatturapa_sale.tests.test_fatturapa_sale.TestFatturapaSale.test_create_invoice
documentation:
Generate an invoice from a sale order.
Check that related documents are passed
from the sale order (and its lines) to the invoice (and its lines).

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_fatturapa_sale.tests.test_fatturapa_sale.TestFatturapaSale.test_create_invoice_multiple
documentation:
Generate a grouping invoice from multiple orders.
Check that related documents are passed
from the sale orders (and their lines)
to the invoice (and its lines).

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_fatturapa_sale.tests.test_fatturapa_sale.TestFatturapaSale.test_keep_document
documentation:
Delete an invoice having related documents.
Check that the related documents are no more deleted
if linked to a sale order.
